text: - Hello. - Hi. - Good afternoon, my name is Rebecca. I'm calling about a quick eligibility review on your account. It shows you qualify for the updated benefits, but they were never activated, including credits, convenience upgrades, and added protections. So I can get those added for you at no cost. You have Part A and B, right? - You see a credit that updates your credit. - Just confirming, do you currently have both Medicare Part A and B? - Yes. - Awesome. Can you tell me your age, please? - I'm 66 today. - Got it. Please hold while I connect you to the benefits specialist. - Hi, my name is Daniel. I'm calling you from home health care. How are you doing today? - I'm all right, I'm not in it.
